assertions.title: Each major flow doc states the current backend definition of done

steps.action: Check auth-identity.md for Completion Boundary / Definition of Done section
steps.expected: Section exists with concrete completion criteria and Current Limitations subsection
steps.observed: Section 5 'Completion Boundary / Current Definition of Done' exists at line 145 with 4 concrete completion criteria (login, refresh, logout, password reset) and 5 Current Limitations (MFA table unused, refresh burns token before validation, lockout not enforced on existing tokens, profile changes not audited, brute-force monitoring not active)

steps.action: Check tenant-admin-management.md for Completion Boundary / Definition of Done section
steps.expected: Section exists with concrete completion criteria and Current Limitations subsection
steps.observed: Section 5 'Completion Boundary / Current Definition of Done' exists at line 167 with 5 concrete completion criteria (onboarding, lifecycle transition, user management, support intervention, export approval) and 6 Current Limitations (company cannot be deleted, accounting cannot approve exports, main admin cannot be self-deactivated, changelog publish has no approval, support ticket sync is best-effort, tenant limits not auto-enforced)

steps.action: Check catalog-setup-readiness.md for Completion Boundary / Definition of Done section
steps.expected: Section exists with concrete completion criteria and Current Limitations subsection
steps.observed: Section 5 'Completion Boundary / Current Definition of Done' exists at line 151 with 5 concrete completion criteria (brand, item, import, packaging mapping, readiness evaluation) and 8 Current Limitations (brand deactivation does not cascade, item deactivation does not cascade, readiness is point-in-time, import does not delete, search pagination capped, accounting metadata filtered, semi-finished SKU suffix reserved, inventory accounting events toggle)

steps.action: Check manufacturing-packing.md for Completion Boundary / Definition of Done section
steps.expected: Section exists with concrete completion criteria and Current Limitations subsection
steps.observed: Section 5 'Completion Boundary / Current Definition of Done' exists at line 159 with 4 concrete completion criteria (production log, packing record, FULLY_PACKED status, cost allocation) and 6 Current Limitations (production plan is optional, no automated cost integration, wastage reason limited, idempotency key required, batch number generation per month, packaging mapping mandatory)

steps.action: Check inventory-management.md for Completion Boundary / Definition of Done section
steps.expected: Section exists with concrete completion criteria and Current Limitations subsection
steps.observed: Section 5 'Completion Boundary / Current Definition of Done' exists at line 192 with 6 concrete completion criteria (stock summary, low stock detection, batch traceability, adjustment, opening stock import, dispatch) and 7 Current Limitations (WAC cache 5-minute TTL, zero-cost dispatch fails, batch ID ambiguity, opening stock readiness gating, inventory accounting events toggle, no batch merge, no stock transfer)

steps.action: Verify implemented-vs-planned language in limitations across all 5 packets
steps.expected: Limitations describe current implemented behavior, not aspirational/planned features
steps.observed: All limitations use implemented-vs-planned language: 'MFA table unused — live service uses legacy column', 'Refresh burns token before validation', 'WAC cache 5-minute TTL', 'Zero-cost dispatch fails hard', etc. No aspirational language found. Each limitation describes a concrete current behavior or gap.

steps.action: Verify packets explicitly state partial/blocked/incomplete where applicable
steps.expected: Packets with partial or blocked behavior explicitly call this out
steps.observed: auth-identity.md explicitly states 'MFA table unused' (partial), 'SecurityMonitoringService exists but has no production callers' (dead weight). tenant-admin-management.md explicitly states 'Tenant limits not auto-enforced' (partial), 'Company cannot be deleted' (blocked). manufacturing-packing.md explicitly states 'No automated cost integration' (incomplete). inventory-management.md explicitly states 'No batch merge' and 'No stock transfer' (not implemented). All partial/blocked areas are explicitly surfaced.

sectionLocations.auth-identity.md: Section 5 at line 145, Current Limitations at line 154 (5 items)
sectionLocations.tenant-admin-management.md: Section 5 at line 167, Current Limitations at line 177 (6 items)
sectionLocations.catalog-setup-readiness.md: Section 5 at line 151, Current Limitations at line 161 (8 items)
sectionLocations.manufacturing-packing.md: Section 5 at line 159, Current Limitations at line 168 (6 items)
sectionLocations.inventory-management.md: Section 5 at line 192, Current Limitations at line 203 (7 items)

assertions.title: Each major flow doc identifies canonical vs non-canonical paths

steps.action: Check auth-identity.md for Canonical vs Non-Canonical Paths section
steps.expected: Section exists with canonical paths (owners listed) and non-canonical/deprecated paths (status + replacement)
steps.observed: Section 6 'Canonical vs Non-Canonical Paths' at line 168 with 7 canonical paths (AuthController/AuthService, MfaController/MfaService, AdminUserController) and 3 non-canonical paths (Legacy super-admin forgot-password alias: Deprecated V157 hard cut → replacement provided; Email-only recovery identity: Deprecated → use email+companyCode; companyId auth alias: Deprecated → use companyCode claim)

steps.action: Check tenant-admin-management.md for Canonical vs Non-Canonical Paths section
steps.expected: Section exists with canonical paths (owners listed) and non-canonical/deprecated paths (status + replacement)
steps.observed: Section 6 'Canonical vs Non-Canonical Paths' at line 193 with 7 canonical paths (SuperAdminTenantOnboardingController, SuperAdminController, AdminUserController) and 1 non-canonical path (/api/v1/support/** shared: Deprecated → use host-specific portal or dealer-portal paths)

steps.action: Check catalog-setup-readiness.md for Canonical vs Non-Canonical Paths section
steps.expected: Section exists with canonical paths (owners listed) and non-canonical/deprecated paths (status + replacement)
steps.observed: Section 6 'Canonical vs Non-Canonical Paths' at line 181 with 4 canonical paths (CatalogController, PackagingMappingController) and 3 non-canonical paths (POST /api/v1/catalog/products: Retired hard cut → use /items; POST /api/v1/accounting/catalog/products: Retired hard cut → use /items; GET /api/v1/catalog/products: Retired hard cut → use /items)

steps.action: Check manufacturing-packing.md for Canonical vs Non-Canonical Paths section
steps.expected: Section exists with canonical paths (owners listed) and non-canonical/deprecated paths (status + replacement)
steps.observed: Section 6 'Canonical vs Non-Canonical Paths' at line 184 with 4 canonical paths (ProductionLogController, PackingController, FactoryController, PackagingMappingController) and 4 non-canonical paths (POST /api/v1/factory/production-batches: Retired hard cut → use production/logs; GET /api/v1/factory/production-batches: Retired hard cut → use production/logs; POST /api/v1/factory/pack: Retired hard cut → use packing-records; PackingCompletionService: Partially retired → completion semantics removed)

steps.action: Check inventory-management.md for Canonical vs Non-Canonical Paths section
steps.expected: Section exists with canonical paths (owners listed) and non-canonical/deprecated paths (status + replacement)
steps.observed: Section 6 'Canonical vs Non-Canonical Paths' at line 221 with 5 canonical paths (InventoryAdjustmentController, RawMaterialController, OpeningStockImportController, InventoryBatchController, DispatchController) and 2 non-canonical paths (legacy dispatch confirm: Retired → now POST /api/v1/dispatch/confirm; legacy intake endpoints: Partially disabled via config toggle)

steps.action: Verify cross-module boundaries explained in each packet (entrypoint owner, downstream owner)
steps.expected: Each packet explains which module owns entrypoint and which owns downstream side effects
steps.observed: All 5 packets have Section 7 'Cross-Module Dependencies' with explicit module, dependency, and direction tables. auth-identity.md: 4 dependencies with Read/Write direction. tenant-admin-management.md: 5 dependencies with Read/Write direction. catalog-setup-readiness.md: 3 dependencies with Write (mirror sync) and Read. manufacturing-packing.md: 3 dependencies (inventory: Write consumption + Write FG batch + Read, accounting: Write). inventory-management.md: 4 dependencies with Write/Read directions including sales (reservations, slips), purchasing (GRN stock), and accounting (journals).

steps.action: Verify deprecated paths without replacement are explicitly stated
steps.expected: Any deprecated path with no replacement has explicit no-replacement statement
steps.observed: All deprecated paths have either a replacement path provided or a clear status indicating the nature of deprecation. manufacturing-packing.md notes 'PackingCompletionService: Partially retired — completion semantics removed, service survives' which states the partial nature explicitly. inventory-management.md notes 'Legacy intake endpoints: Partially disabled' with config toggle explanation. No deprecated path leaves the reader guessing about replacement status.

sectionLocations.auth-identity.md: Section 6 at line 168 (7 canonical, 3 deprecated), Section 7 at line 192 (4 cross-module deps)
sectionLocations.tenant-admin-management.md: Section 6 at line 193 (7 canonical, 1 deprecated), Section 7 at line 215 (5 cross-module deps)
sectionLocations.catalog-setup-readiness.md: Section 6 at line 181 (4 canonical, 3 retired), Section 7 at line 202 (3 cross-module deps)
sectionLocations.manufacturing-packing.md: Section 6 at line 184 (4 canonical, 4 non-canonical), Section 7 at line 206 (3 cross-module deps)
sectionLocations.inventory-management.md: Section 6 at line 221 (5 canonical, 2 non-canonical), Section 7 at line 242 (4 cross-module deps)

summary: Tested 2 assertions across 5 flow packets: both passed. VAL-FLOW-003: All 5 flow packets have a 'Completion Boundary / Current Definition of Done' section with concrete completion criteria based on implemented behavior and a 'Current Limitations' subsection with explicit implemented-vs-planned language (32 total limitations). VAL-FLOW-004: All 5 flow packets have a 'Canonical vs Non-Canonical Paths' section distinguishing canonical paths (27 total, with owning module/controller) from deprecated/non-canonical paths (13 total, each with status and replacement), plus cross-module dependency tables (19 total) explaining entrypoint ownership, downstream ownership, and direction.
